category_sources: Official Apache Groovy documentation describes Groovy as a JVM programming language.
display_name_sources: Official Groovy documentation and Apache project pages use Apache Groovy.
source_facts.homepage is the official Groovy website.
docs_sources: Apache Groovy project site is an official Apache project surface.
Official Groovy website provides a dedicated documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Apache Groovy repository documentation states the official Git repository is gitbox.apache.org/repos/asf/groovy.git.
tags_sources: Official Apache Groovy README describes a JVM programming language integrating with Java.
source_facts.description identifies a Java-based scripting language.
